channel.title: Nitin Gadura — NYC + Long Island Real Estate
channel.description: NYC + Long Island real estate guidance from Nitin Gadura, NYS Salesperson #10401383405. Sell, rent, calculate, navigate.

item.title: Sell Your Home — NYC + Long Island Guide
item.description: Comprehensive seller guides for 88 NYC and Long Island neighborhoods. Real medians, full-service vs flat-fee options, multilingual representation.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura

item.title: Rent Out Your Apartment — NY Landlord Guide
item.description: Landlord guides covering NY-compliant tenant screening, rent pricing, lease execution across 88 neighborhoods.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura

item.title: NY Real Estate Calculators
item.description: Free NY-specific real estate calculators: mortgage, mansion tax, NYC closing costs, rent-vs-buy, FHA self-sufficiency, 1031 exchange timeline.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura

item.title: NYC + LI Commercial Corridors
item.description: Real estate guides for Liberty Avenue, Hillside Avenue, Queens Boulevard, Northern Boulevard, Hempstead Turnpike.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura

item.title: NY Landlord & Tenant Glossary
item.description: 50+ NY rental terms explained: rent stabilization, source-of-income protection, security deposit cap, broker fee rules.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura

item.title: About Nitin Gadura
item.description: Licensed NYS Real Estate Salesperson #10401383405, $100M+ closed, multilingual.
item.dc:creator: Nitin Gadura
